title: Add reusable score version mechanical test for optimizer
description: Create shared score-version mechanical test service, expose as CLI and MCP tool, and replace optimizer manual smoke testing with the shared tool.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented shared mechanical score-version test service in plexus/cli/shared/score_version_test.py with 90-day sampling policy: explicit items override sample count; otherwise sample recent feedback items for the score, then fallback to scorecard recent items from score results. Added plexus score test CLI command (JSON output) and new MCP tool plexus_score_test that call the same shared service. Updated feedback optimizer YAML to replace both duplicated manual smoke-test blocks with plexus_score_test and removed obsolete smoke_test_item_ids state plumbing. Added tests in plexus/cli/shared/test_score_version_test.py and optimizer config assertion for the shared tool call. Ran pytest -q plexus/cli/shared/test_score_version_test.py and pytest -q plexus/cli/procedure/test_feedback_alignment_optimizer_config.py (all passing).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Patched optimizer YAML to define missing safe_encode() near safe_decode() and eliminated nil-global crash in score-test failure detail branches. Added regression assertions in test_feedback_alignment_optimizer_config.py for safe_encode definition and usage in both failures/predictions detail paths. Verified with: pytest -q plexus/cli/procedure/test_feedback_alignment_optimizer_config.py (5 passed).
